rules.title: Composite SKU known in reference catalogue
rules.description: Checks if the submitted SKU exists in the approved catalogue

rules.title: One Force org linked to many Anypoint orgs
rules.description: A single Force org mapped to multiple Anypoint orgs violates tenant trust constraints

rules.title: Multi-order with multiple Anypoint orgs
rules.description: Multi-order patterns with more than one Anypoint org require sequencing and trust teardown validation

rules.title: PTR required for composite fulfillment provider
rules.description: If Product Fulfillment Provider is composite, PTR must be populated on all PLMs

rules.title: PTR must be blank for non-composite products
rules.description: If Product Fulfillment Provider is not composite, PTR should not be set on PLMs

rules.title: PTR changes on active auto-provisioned SKUs are restricted
rules.description: Updating PTR on active auto-provisioned SKUs may fail with INVALID_INPUT unless SKU is moved to a safe config state first

rules.title: PTR and Product PTR Trust are distinct configurations
rules.description: PTR on PLM is mandatory for composite setup; Product Provisioning Target Role Trust on Product2 is separate and should be validated independently

rules.title: Composite trust establishment requires trust roles
rules.description: If trust roles are missing on the composite SKU, trust establishment can be skipped

rules.title: Composite SKU should provision through PTG
rules.description: Composite SKUs should map to a Provisioning Target Group containing required Tenants and Tenant Parameter Maps per CSP

rules.title: Integration name must be allowlisted
rules.description: Provisioning requires IntegrationName entry in licensing allowlist configuration

rules.title: Single pricebook per contract constraint
rules.description: Composite purchase may fail if required products are split across incompatible pricebooks under one contract

rules.title: MuleSoft + Tableau direct composite pairing unsupported
rules.description: Current framework supports Core plus another CSP pattern; direct MuleSoft + Tableau bundle should be treated as unsupported unless policy changes

rules.title: Slack CSP onboarded but no Org62 composite SKU
rules.description: Slack is onboarded in framework but may not have a live composite SKU in Org62

rules.title: Flex Foundation prerequisite for MuleSoft base subscriptions
rules.description: MuleSoft base composite subscriptions may require Salesforce Flex Foundation entitlement to be present
